description: Engagement contract, draft. The scribe repeated a number of lines of the document as well as the names of the bride and groom several times. Two different groom's names are mentioned, suggesting either that the document was intended for scribal practice, or that the scribe confused the Hebrew and Arabic names for the same individual.
description_he: מסמך משפטי בHebrew, Judaeo-Arabic. מוחזק בבית המדרש לרבנים.
